programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: While on a family trip to the flea market, Bob and Linda are haunted by a lie they told Tina, Gene and Louise about what really happened to their beloved stuffed animal, Wheelie Mammoth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny are drawn together after a disastrous visit from Leonard's mother.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker is beset with troubles in his failing personal life as he battles a former brilliant scientist named Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Brain Games
programme.desc: Brain Games reveals how optical illusions are a great way of showing the powerful mechanisms at work that allow your brain to perceive three dimensions.
